description_long: This is a stealth military airplane with a distinctive angular, faceted design, primarily finished in matte black. The fuselage is sharply pointed at the nose, with a flat, wide body that tapers toward the rear. The wings are sharply swept back and integrated into the body, forming a triangular, almost delta-like planform with no visible external engines. Twin vertical stabilizers are canted inward at the rear, contributing to its radar-evading profile. The cockpit is positioned forward and is enclosed with a faceted canopy, blending seamlessly into the fuselage. There are no visible landing gear or external armaments, emphasizing its streamlined, stealth-oriented construction.
description: A matte black, angular stealth airplane with swept-back wings, twin canted vertical stabilizers, and a forward, faceted cockpit canopy.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sharply angled, flat fuselage, swept-back wings, and twin canted vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the triangular, faceted nose, wide wing span, and the forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the angular body and twin stabilizers.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full delta-like wing shape and the integrated, faceted design of the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept, delta-like planform with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; likely internal jet configuration.
attribute_tail_design: Twin canted vertical stabilizers with no horizontal stabilizer; V-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: No landing gear visible; likely retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed, single-seat cockpit with a faceted canopy integrated into the fuselage.
